query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM menu_items WHERE establishmentId IN (506, 557, 1668, 1761, 1803, 2053, 2584, 2927, 3198, 3679, 3951, 4376, 4656, 4674, 5083, 5579)) as menu_items,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ratings WHERE establishmentId IN (506, 557, 1668, 1761, 1803, 2053, 2584, 2927, 3198, 3679, 3951, 4376, 4656, 4674, 5083, 5579)) as ratings,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_rankings WHERE establishmentId IN (506, 557, 1668, 1761, 1803, 2053, 2584, 2927, 3198, 3679, 3951, 4376, 4656, 4674, 5083, 5579)) as rankings;

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM menu_items WHERE establishmentId IN (506, 557, 1668, 1761, 1803, 2053, 2584, 2927, 3198, 3679, 3951, 4376, 4656, 4674, 5083, 5579)) as menu_items,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ratings WHERE establishmentId IN (506, 557, 1668, 1761, 1803, 2053, 2584, 2927, 3198, 3679, 3951, 4376, 4656, 4674, 5083, 5579)) as ratings,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_rankings WHERE establishmentId IN (506, 557, 1668, 1761, 1803, 2053, 2584, 2927, 3198, 3679, 3951, 4376, 4656, 4674, 5083, 5579)) as rankings;
